expectations.evidence: Step 1: "bun add -D @biomejs/biome" -- installs Biome as a dev dependency.
biome.json formatter section: "\"indentStyle\": \"tab\"" -- configures tab indentation.
biome.json javascript.formatter section: "\"quoteStyle\": \"single\"" -- configures single quotes.

expectations.text: Response sets noUnusedVariables and noUnusedImports to error
expectations.evidence: biome.json linter rules: "\"noUnusedVariables\": \"error\", \"noUnusedImports\": \"error\"" -- both set to error.

expectations.text: Response adds package.json scripts (lint, format, check)
expectations.evidence: The response only adds two scripts: "\"lint\": \"biome check .\"" and "\"lint:fix\": \"biome check --write .\"". There is no separate 'format' or 'check' script. The assertion requires lint, format, AND check scripts.
